zh.Bass Rock, North Berwick, East Lothian,: 蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾諾斯 貝維其可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alicia Campbell於1314年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾時，她的父親Colin Callen Oig Campbell34歲，母親Helena Lennox Menteith29歲。她於大約1342年與Sir Alan De Lauder 1st of Haltoun, Keeper of Tantallon Castle在蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1371年在她的家鄉享年57歲。

zh-hans.Bass Rock, North Berwick, East Lothian,: 苏格兰哈丁頓史爾諾斯 貝維其可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alicia Campbell于1314年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾时，她的父亲Colin Callen Oig Campbell34岁，母亲Helena Lennox Menteith29岁。她于大约1342年与Sir Alan De Lauder 1st of Haltoun, Keeper of Tantallon Castle在苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1371年在她的家乡享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Campbell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Camble
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Campbell  .

variants.name: Campbel
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Campbell  .

variants.name: Cambell
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Campbell  .

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Alicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisha
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisia
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alyssa
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alissa .

variants.name: Alissa
meanings: Contracted form of   Alicia .

variants.name: Alesha
meanings: Respelling of   Alicia .

en.lifeSummary: When Alicia Campbell was born in 1314, in Argyll, Scotland, her father, Colin Callen Oig Campbell, was 34 and her mother, Helena Lennox Menteith, was 29. She married Sir Alan De Lauder 1st of Haltoun, Keeper of Tantallon Castle about 1342, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1371, in her hometown, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alicia Campbell est née en 1314, à Argyll, Écosse, son père, Colin Callen Oig Campbell, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Helena Lennox Menteith, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Alan De Lauder 1st of Haltoun, Keeper of Tantallon Castle environ 1342, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1371, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alicia Campbell 1314 in Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Colin Callen Oig Campbell 34 und ihre Mutter Helena Lennox Menteith 29. Sie hat um 1342 in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland Sir Alan De Lauder 1st of Haltoun, Keeper of Tantallon Castle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1371 im Alter von 57 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alicia Campbell è nata il nel 1314 nel Argyll, Scotland, sua padre, Colin Callen Oig Campbell, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Helena Lennox Menteith, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Sir Alan De Lauder 1st of Haltoun, Keeper of Tantallon Castle circa 1342, nel Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1371, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alicia Campbellが1314年にスコットランドアルグイルで生まれた時，父Colin Callen Oig Campbellは34歳，母Helena Lennox Menteithは29歳であった。約1342年にスコットランドアルグイルロチャウでSir Alan De Lauder 1st of Haltoun, Keeper of Tantallon Castleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1371年に故郷で57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alicia Campbell(이)가 1314년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Colin Callen Oig Campbell(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helena Lennox Menteith(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1342년 스컷랜드 아그이 럭아w에서 Sir Alan De Lauder 1st of Haltoun, Keeper of Tantallon Castle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1371년 그녀의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alicia Campbell nasceu em 1314, em Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Colin Callen Oig Campbell, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Helena Lennox Menteith, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Alan De Lauder 1st of Haltoun, Keeper of Tantallon Castle aproximadamente 1342, em Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1371, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alicia Campbell родилась в 1314 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Colin Callen Oig Campbell было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Helena Lennox Menteith, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Alan De Lauder 1st of Haltoun, Keeper of Tantallon Castle около 1342 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1371 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alicia Campbell nació en 1314, en Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Colin Callen Oig Campbell, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Helena Lennox Menteith, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Sir Alan De Lauder 1st of Haltoun, Keeper of Tantallon Castle aproximadamente 1342, en Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1371, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años.
